model.name: redeliveryPolicy
model.title: Redelivery Policy
model.description: Configures message redelivery for error handling, including maximum retries, delay patterns, and backoff settings
model.label: configuration,errorhandling

maximumRedeliveries.description: Sets the maximum number of redeliveries. Use 0 for no redeliveries, or -1 to redeliver forever.

redeliveryDelay.description: Sets the initial delay in milliseconds before the first redelivery attempt.

asyncDelayedRedelivery.label: advanced
asyncDelayedRedelivery.description: Allow asynchronous delayed redelivery. The route, in particular the consumer's component, must support the Asynchronous Routing Engine (e.g. seda).

backOffMultiplier.description: Sets the multiplier applied to the previous redelivery delay to compute the next delay when using exponential backoff.

useExponentialBackOff.label: advanced
useExponentialBackOff.description: Enables exponential backoff, so each subsequent redelivery delay is multiplied by the backOffMultiplier.

collisionAvoidanceFactor.label: advanced
collisionAvoidanceFactor.description: Sets the collision avoidance factor, which adds a random percentage of the delay to avoid thundering herd problems when multiple redeliveries happen simultaneously.

useCollisionAvoidance.label: advanced
useCollisionAvoidance.description: Enables collision avoidance, which adds a random factor to redelivery delays to prevent multiple simultaneous redeliveries from colliding.

maximumRedeliveryDelay.description: Sets the upper bound on redelivery delay in milliseconds when using exponential backoff, to prevent delays from growing unbounded.

retriesExhaustedLogLevel.label: advanced
retriesExhaustedLogLevel.description: Sets the logging level to use when all retries have been exhausted and the message is moved to the dead letter channel or failed.

retryAttemptedLogLevel.description: Sets the logging level to use when a redelivery attempt is made.

retryAttemptedLogInterval.label: advanced
retryAttemptedLogInterval.description: Sets how often to log redelivery attempts. For example, a value of 3 logs every 3rd redelivery attempt.

logRetryAttempted.label: advanced
logRetryAttempted.description: Whether retry attempts should be logged or not. Can be used to include or reduce verbose logging.

logStackTrace.label: advanced
logStackTrace.description: Whether stack traces should be logged. Can be used to include or reduce verbose logging.

logRetryStackTrace.label: advanced
logRetryStackTrace.description: Whether stack traces should be logged when a retry attempt failed. Can be used to include or reduce verbose logging.

logHandled.label: advanced
logHandled.description: Whether handled exceptions should be logged or not. Can be used to include or reduce verbose logging.

logNewException.label: advanced
logNewException.description: Whether new exceptions should be logged or not. A new exception is an exception that was thrown while handling a previous exception.

logContinued.description: Whether continued exceptions should be logged or not. Can be used to include or reduce verbose logging.

logExhausted.label: advanced
logExhausted.description: Whether exhausted exceptions should be logged or not. Can be used to include or reduce verbose logging.

logExhaustedMessageHistory.label: advanced
logExhaustedMessageHistory.description: Whether exhausted exceptions should be logged including message history. Can be used to include or reduce verbose logging.

logExhaustedMessageBody.label: advanced
logExhaustedMessageBody.description: Whether exhausted message body should be logged including message history. Requires logExhaustedMessageHistory to be enabled.

disableRedelivery.label: advanced
disableRedelivery.description: Disables redelivery (same as setting maximum redeliveries to 0).

delayPattern.label: advanced
delayPattern.description: Sets the delay pattern for redeliveries using a pattern such as '0:1000;5:5000;10:30000' where each entry maps a redelivery count to a delay in milliseconds (e.g. redeliveries 0-4 use 1s delay, 5-9 use 5s, 10 use 30s).

allowRedeliveryWhileStopping.label: advanced
allowRedeliveryWhileStopping.description: Controls whether to allow redelivery while stopping/shutting down a route that uses error handling.

exchangeFormatterRef.label: advanced
exchangeFormatterRef.description: Sets the reference of the instance of org.apache.camel.spi.ExchangeFormatter to generate the log message from exchange.
